text.title: Paid Acquisition Growth Strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real growth-paid-acquisition engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Doubled Meta spend in 3 days; CAC up 80%; back to learning phase.
antipattern.fix: Cap weekly ramp at +20%; revert to last stable budget when CAC spikes.

antipattern.symptom: B2C DTC tried LinkedIn; CAC $400 with $40 LTV.
antipattern.root-cause: Channel chosen for prestige, not fit.
antipattern.fix: Apply channel-fit gate before any spend; route to Meta for B2C.

antipattern.symptom: Channel CAC 2x ceiling for 6 weeks; team kept pushing 'fatigue will pass'.
antipattern.fix: Define stop-loss CAC = ceiling × 1.3; auto-pause when breached for 2 weeks.
